name: Bushrangers Bay Walk
address: Cape Schanck Rd, Cape Schanck VIC 3939
editorNote: Bushrangers Bay is the walk we send people to when they say they want to see the wilder side of the Peninsula without committing to a full-day hike. The track drops from the Cape Schanck lighthouse precinct through coastal scrub and opens onto a broad crescent of basalt and sand that feels much further from Melbourne than it is. The return climb is enough to justify lunch afterwards, but not so punishing that it tips into chore. Do it in the late afternoon when the light starts to flatten across the water and the whole coastline turns silver.

heroImage.alt: Bushrangers Bay beach below Cape Schanck with cliffs and open water beyond
